title: codereview2 after lora_l2 CCA
description: Pass 2: CCA placed after tx_pending inc but before modem lock - good for arbitration. However, on busy return, the tx_buf_mutex is not unlocked in one path (bug). Fix mutex handling. Also, link layer integration missing. (project-LICHEN-da2q.15.7)
close_reason: Fixed CCA mutex unlock in all busy/timeout paths in lora_l2_tx (tx_buf_mutex now unlocked before every return). Added TDMA/link layer integration calls in lora_l2 per spec (lichen_link_tx + slot check). Zephyr builds/tests clean. 3 codereview passes (Rust/C/spec) produced 0 open findings after fixes. All 4 beads closed clean.
